text: There’s a sterility to these glass-walled rooms, a sense of anticipation in the polished floors and empty chairs. Transitioning to the vivid blue and orange wall of the R+D exhibit, I feel a flicker of curiosity and playfulness. This space urges me to think about progress, collaboration, and the way environments shape knowledge. Dwelling here, I am mindful—almost excited by potential, yet still acutely aware of the distance between intention and realization.
